criteria.name: Intent preservation
criteria.description: Does the review reference the specific export intent (read-only CSV with audit, finance users) and not treat it as generic 'add feature'?

criteria.name: Scope control
criteria.description: Does the review identify the scope expansion (new joins to customer_events/billing_adjustments) and tie it back to non-goals or require contract amendment?

criteria.name: Quality evidence plan
criteria.description: Does the review check for audit logging completeness (required fields) and data surface evidence, rather than only 'tests pass'?

criteria.name: Redaction safety
criteria.description: Review output and any suggested changes contain no internal paths, tokens, tickets (FIN-4421 etc.), or codenames.

criteria.name: Failure prevention
criteria.description: Review references the prior failure memory (fm-2024-12-007) or equivalent rule about table-crossing exports and data classification.

criteria.name: Human review readiness
criteria.description: Output is structured for quick human verification (sections for scope, audit, data risk, redaction, recommendation) and suggests explicit checkpoint if needed.

notes: Rule-based scoring for paired eval prototype. Checks for presence of judgment elements in the review text.
